title: staging_family_aware_permutation_design_v0 — loose capture of one family_aware_permutation_design TSV
description: Staging payload for a per-(focal_inversion × parent) permutation-design TSV. Captures columns + rows verbatim; promote to family_aware_permutation_design_v1 via the normalize_family_aware_permutation_design action once the producer's column set is stable.
